frontier_justification: Reasoning capabilities of LLMs are at the center of AI research in 2025-2026. The lineage from CoT to RL-based reasoning (o1/DeepSeek-R1) defines the current frontier, with active debate on whether test-time compute scaling continues to yield returns.

papers.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.key_contribution: Intermediate reasoning steps (chain-of-thought) in prompts dramatically improve LLM performance on complex reasoning tasks.

idea_genome.problem_genome: LLMs fail on multi-step reasoning tasks (math, commonsense, symbolic) when prompted to answer directly.
idea_genome.mechanism_genome: Provide exemplars with step-by-step reasoning traces in the prompt; the model imitates this structure at inference time.
idea_genome.observation_genome: Few-shot CoT prompting yields large gains on GSM8K, MATH, and symbolic reasoning; emerges only in models >100B parameters.
idea_genome.limitation_genome: CoT relies on sampling a single reasoning chain; stochastic errors compound across steps; no verification of intermediate steps.

papers.title: Self-Consistency Improves Chain of Thought Reasoning in Language Models
papers.key_contribution: Sample diverse reasoning paths with CoT and take the majority vote answer, replacing greedy decoding.

idea_genome.problem_genome: A single CoT reasoning chain is fragile; a wrong intermediate step invalidates the final answer.
idea_genome.mechanism_genome: Sample k diverse chains via temperature sampling, aggregate final answers by majority vote; no model change needed.
idea_genome.observation_genome: Self-consistency gains +10–20% on GSM8K, MATH, and commonsense benchmarks over greedy CoT; ensemble of chains.
idea_genome.limitation_genome: k chains cost k× inference compute; all chains still start from the same flat sequential structure; no tree search.

papers.title: Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving with Large Language Models
papers.key_contribution: Organize LLM reasoning as a tree where each node is a partial thought; use BFS/DFS with self-evaluation for deliberate problem solving.

idea_genome.problem_genome: Flat sequential CoT cannot backtrack or explore alternative reasoning paths; struggles on planning tasks.
idea_genome.mechanism_genome: Decompose reasoning into a tree of thoughts; generate multiple continuations per node; LLM evaluates node promise; BFS/DFS search.
idea_genome.observation_genome: ToT solves 74% of Game of 24 vs 4% for CoT; significant gains on creative writing and crossword tasks.
idea_genome.limitation_genome: Combinatorial search cost; LLM-as-evaluator is unreliable; no learned value function for node scoring.

papers.title: Let's Verify Step by Step
papers.key_contribution: Process Reward Models (PRMs) trained with step-level human feedback outperform outcome-level ORMs for mathematical reasoning verification.

idea_genome.problem_genome: Outcome-based reward models cannot detect which step in a reasoning chain is wrong; search requires reliable intermediate scoring.
idea_genome.mechanism_genome: Collect human labels for correctness at each reasoning step; train a PRM to score step quality; use PRM to rerank or guide beam search.
idea_genome.observation_genome: PRM800K dataset; PRMs achieve >70% accuracy on MATH competition problems; substantially better than ORMs for search.
idea_genome.limitation_genome: Step-level annotation is expensive; PRM may overfit to annotation artifacts; requires combining with separate generator.

papers.title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning
papers.key_contribution: Pure RL (GRPO) on reasoning tasks without supervised chain-of-thought distillation produces frontier reasoning capabilities; open-weights model matching o1.

idea_genome.problem_genome: SFT-distilled CoT models plateau; process reward models require costly annotation; need scalable RL for reasoning.
idea_genome.mechanism_genome: GRPO (group relative policy optimization): sample multiple outputs per prompt, use correctness as reward signal, normalize by group baseline; no PRM needed.
idea_genome.observation_genome: DeepSeek-R1 achieves 79.8% on AIME 2024, matching o1; emergent long chain-of-thought reasoning with self-verification.
idea_genome.limitation_genome: Requires high-quality verifiable reward signal (math/code); language mixing artifacts in reasoning chains; RL training instability.

papers.title: The Molecular Structure of Thought: Mapping the Topology of Long Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
papers.key_contribution: Identifies stable structural patterns (Deep-Reasoning, Self-Reflection, Self-Exploration) in Long CoT; introduces Mole-Syn for synthesizing structured Long CoT training data; provides mechanistic analysis of why RLVR reasoning succeeds.

idea_genome.problem_genome: LLMs struggle to learn extended reasoning chains from imitation; unclear why RLVR produces emergent Long CoT; no principled framework for understanding Long CoT structure.
idea_genome.mechanism_genome: Graph-based topology analysis of Long CoT trajectories identifies three interaction bond types (Deep-Reasoning, Self-Reflection, Self-Exploration); Mole-Syn synthesizes training data with controlled structural composition.
idea_genome.observation_genome: Stable structural patterns emerge naturally during fine-tuning rather than keyword mimicry; Mole-Syn-generated training data improves performance and training stability over unstructured Long CoT.
idea_genome.limitation_genome: Structural topology identifies patterns post-hoc but cannot predict which structure a problem requires; no mechanism for adaptive structure selection at inference time.

edges.evolution_focus: Adds majority voting over sampled reasoning chains to CoT; same prompting paradigm, improves reliability without structural change.
Replaces flat sequential sampling with tree-structured search; fundamentally new reasoning paradigm with backtracking and node evaluation.
Adds learned step-level verification (PRM) to guide tree search; same tree-based reasoning structure with better node scoring.
Combines RL training (from alignment literature) with CoT reasoning and process-level reward signals into end-to-end reasoning model training.
Mechanistic analysis of Long CoT structural topology and synthetic data improvement on top of R1's RLVR recipe; same RL-based reasoning paradigm, adds structural understanding and synthesis.

open_question: Mole-Syn identifies structural patterns in successful Long CoT but cannot predict which reasoning structure a given problem requires. What mechanism would enable adaptive reasoning architecture selection — dynamically choosing, verifying, and stopping Deep-Reasoning, Self-Reflection, and Self-Exploration modes based on problem structure while maintaining calibrated reliability on unfamiliar tasks?

question.name: Question
question.description: Present only the domain/subfield and the curated May-2026 research question; ask the model to propose a next-step research direction in Natural Language Processing / Reasoning.

library.name: Library
library.description: Present the curated research frontier plus 6 trace papers in random order with paper titles and brief abstracts, but without explicit lineage order, genome fields, or dynamics labels; ask the model to propose the next research direction.

lineage.name: Lineage
lineage.description: Present the curated research frontier plus the ordered trace with genome metadata, GenomeDiff-style change evidence, and parent-child relationships; ask the model to predict the next evolutionary step without naming predefined category labels.

frontier_evidence.title: The Molecular Structure of Thought: Mapping the Topology of Long Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
frontier_evidence.unresolved_gap: Structural topology identifies patterns post-hoc but cannot predict which structure a problem requires; no mechanism for adaptive structure selection at inference time.
frontier_evidence.why_frontier: Used as the May 2026 frontier anchor: the arena question targets a limitation that remains unresolved at the endpoint of this lineage.

frontier_status.manual_review: Re-audited on 2026-05-05 for appendix release: active arena trace has a 2025/2026 frontier endpoint, a non-solved open research question, valid forward lineage edges, and generation settings aligned with post-hoc dynamics evaluation.
frontier_status.prompt_role: The same research question is shown in Question, Library, and Lineage settings; only the supporting literature/lineage context changes.
